* Add Pydantic models for configuration validation

- Introduced `QueueModel` and `ConfigModel` in `pysqa/base/config.py` using Pydantic v2.

- Added `pydantic>=2.0` to project dependencies.
- Updated `_load_templates` to handle queues without a submission script (e.g., remote queues).

commit.message:
Fix timeline: non-overlapping cards, lifespan bars, restore Turing

- Sort mathematicians by birth year; compute non-overlapping Y positions
  per side (left/right) so no two cards ever overlap
- Add Gantt-style lifespan bars in the center using greedy lane assignment,
  colored by field — shows who was alive at the same time at a glance
- Clicking a bar selects that mathematician
- Selected bar highlighted; others dim to 65% opacity
- Card offset from center now scales with the number of lanes
- Turing was hidden by Bézier (same birth year slot) — now both visible

commit.message:
ci: skip merge commits in conventional commit lint

Merge commits use Git's default message format (e.g., 'Merge branch X into Y')
which doesn't follow conventional commit syntax. This is expected and correct.

commit.message:
security: add Strategy 4 to detect cross-directory attacks

When cwd is outside the project, bash commands with absolute paths
to project files were undetected. Strategy 4 extracts absolute paths
from bash commands and walks up from each to find .agents/ directory.

Now catches: rm /path/to/project/file from home directory.

51/51 tests passed (5 + 15 + 31 including 4 cross-directory tests).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Data layer overhaul: PokeAPI, caching, offline, dark mode, cameos

Major data layer changes:
- Add PokeAPI integration (src/lib/pokeApi.ts) for species data and
  evolution chains with proper name handling (Mr. Mime, Farfetch'd, etc.)
- Search cards by nationalPokedexNumbers instead of broken name parsing,
  fixing trainer-owned Pokemon (Marnie's Grimmsnarl = Grimmsnarl #861)
- Add IndexedDB cache layer (src/lib/apiCache.ts) with TTL support
- Add request scheduler (src/lib/requestScheduler.ts) with concurrency
  control, rate-limit handling, retry, and request deduplication
- Add card deduplication after multi-source fetches
- Fix card number sorting for promo/alphanumeric numbers

Service worker and offline:
- Add vite-plugin-pwa with workbox runtime caching for PokeAPI,
  TCG API, card images, and Google Fonts
- Previously viewed data works offline

Evolution chain UX:
- Remove evolution chain toggle from Pokemon selector
- Show evolution chain inline in search results
- Click Pokemon name to add just that one
- Click chain chip to add full evolution line

Dark mode:
- Add system-preference dark mode via prefers-color-scheme media query

Cameo database:
- Import 345 cameo appearances for 91 Pokemon from community spreadsheet
- Add import script (scripts/import-cameos.mjs) to regenerate from CSV
- Simplify CameoBrowser to work with new CameoRecord data format

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
harness: introduce Feature/Backend/Harness composition layer (Phase 5)

Add the harness package providing a composable orchestration layer
between Kernel and applications:

- Feature interface for pluggable capabilities (tools, hooks, prompts)
- Backend interface unifying Workspace + Executor into a single port
- LocalBackend combining existing workspace and executor types
- Harness struct orchestrating Kernel + Backend + ordered Feature install
- 7 concrete Feature constructors: BootstrapContext, SessionPersistence,
  Checkpointing, TaskDelegation, LLMResilience, ExecutionPolicy,
  PatchToolCalls
- Kernel.Apply() method for post-construction option application
- 16 tests covering install ordering, error propagation, nil handling,
  and all feature constructors

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add full 2024 AFL squad rosters with 35-38 players per team

Create afl_rosters_2024.py with complete squad rosters for all 18 AFL
teams from the 2024 season. Each team includes the starting 22 (matching
afl_teams_2024.py exactly) plus 13-16 extended squad/depth players.

- 18 teams with 35-38 players each (649 total players)

commit.message:
Add RequireObjectCoercible + ToString coercion to String prototype methods

String.prototype methods now properly:
- Throw TypeError when called on null/undefined
- Coerce non-string primitives (Number, Boolean, BigInt) via ToString
- Coerce generic objects via JS-level ToString (calls toString/valueOf)

Only applies to string method builtin IDs (110-134) to avoid affecting
other native functions.

Cluster 37 (String): 540 → 394 failures (146 tests fixed)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

game-strings.s: Latin-1 encoding, English comments, direct special chars

- All comments translated to English

  e.g. u-umlaut/o-umlaut/a-umlaut/e-acute now readable as ue/oe/ae/e
  instead of \xfc/\xf6/\xe4/\xe9 escape sequences

- byte-identical verified (diff: 0)

chore(ci): remove superseded post-ci-summary.yml workflow

The post-ci-summary.yml workflow was disabled (workflow_dispatch only)
and superseded by post-ci-summary-on-ci-success.yml. However, a YAML
parse error in its Python heredoc (unindented content inside run: |
block) caused GitHub to record a failure on every push.

Removing the file entirely to eliminate the spurious failures.
